_note: Round 3 (great-grandparents) for the 13 round-2 grandparents in batch e_1400_1750_3. Each existing R2*/R2J_/R2K_ batch person is referenced by id string and joined to newly documented parents (R3J_ prefix) plus full/notable siblings. KEY CORRECTION: Magdalene of Brandenburg (m. Louis V of Hesse-Darmstadt) is NOT a sister of Anne Catherine of Brandenburg — Anne Catherine is daughter of Joachim Frederick, Elector of Brandenburg (family 1), while Magdalene is daughter of Joachim Frederick's FATHER, John George, Elector of Brandenburg, by his third wife (family 5), so they are half-aunt/niece, not sisters. CONVERGENCE: Joachim Ernst, Margrave of Brandenburg-Ansbach (1583-1625) is BOTH a full sibling of Magdalene (child of John George + Elisabeth of Anhalt-Zerbst, defined once as R3J_JOACHIMERNSTANSBACH in family 5) AND the father of Albert II of Brandenburg-Ansbach (family 9, where he is referenced by id string) — no double-parenting. Stillbirths omitted where noted; Spanish-noble siblings of the Medina Sidonia and Velasco lines not documented in English Wikipedia (parents only). 👑 = regnant sovereigns only. Sourced to Wikipedia except Ana de Silva y Mendoza years (Wikidata/Geni) and Sophie Margarete's mother (Familypedia/Wikidata).

families.note: Anne Catherine of Brandenburg -> father Joachim Frederick, Elector of Brandenburg & mother Catherine of Brandenburg-Küstrin (his first wife). Full siblings from that first marriage listed with years (Wikipedia). Half-siblings from Joachim Frederick's second marriage to Eleonore of Prussia excluded (different mother).
